sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current position after RIGHT
nodes = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
white_pos = None
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] == 'W':
        white_pos = n['boundary'][0]
        break
print(f"White dot now at: {white_pos}")
print(f"Previous was [39, 36], so RIGHT moves col by {white_pos[1] - 36}")

# Now I know: UP moves row -3, RIGHT moves col +3 (likely)
# Blue targets: [16,48], [24,40], [24,53], [35,48]
# Current: [39, 39]
# Let me compute steps to each target from [39, 39]
targets = {'t1': [16,48], 't2': [24,40], 't3': [24,53], 't4': [35,48]}
cur = white_pos
for name, t in targets.items():
    dr = t[0] - cur[0]
    dc = t[1] - cur[1]
    steps_up = -dr // 3 if dr < 0 else dr // 3
    steps_right = dc // 3 if dc > 0 else -dc // 3
    print(f"{name} at {t}: need dr={dr}, dc={dc} -> UP={-dr//3}, RIGHT={dc//3}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
